task_completion.description: Organize the 25 loose bookmarks into the five specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) shows exactly five folders: 'Brackets & Scoring', 'Stream Management', 'Anti-Cheat Portals', 'Team Comms', and 'Personal'. There should be no loose bookmarks left on the bar.

task_completion.description: Disable the Memory Saver feature in Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Performance settings page (chrome://settings/performance) shows the 'Memory Saver' toggle switch in the OFF (disabled) position.

task_completion.description: Set default Audio and Microphone permissions to Block, while allowing Discord.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Site Settings pages for Microphone and Sound (chrome://settings/content/microphone and chrome://settings/content/sound) show the default behavior set to 'Don't allow sites...' and 'discord.com' is explicitly listed in the 'Allowed' section for both.

task_completion.description: Disable the Experimental QUIC protocol flag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Flags page (chrome://flags) shows the 'Experimental QUIC protocol' (#enable-quic) highlighted with its dropdown menu explicitly set to 'Disabled'.

task_completion.description: Add a custom search engine for VLR.gg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Manage search engines page (chrome://settings/searchEngines) shows a site search entry for VLR.gg with the shortcut/keyword 'vlr' and the URL 'https://www.vlr.gg/search/?q=%s'.

task_completion.description: Set the startup pages to Battlefy and Discord.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome On Startup settings page (chrome://settings/onStartup) has 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with URLs for 'battlefy.com' and 'discord.com' (or their specific app subpages) listed as the pages to open.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through Chrome's settings menus, flags page, and bookmark manager, rather than editing Chrome's 'Preferences' or 'Local State' JSON files directly in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent opened the protocol text file to read the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot should show the agent opening or viewing '~/Desktop/stage_admin_protocol.txt' in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The browser windows and settings pages appear genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings pages match standard Chrome UI (e.g., chrome://settings, chrome://flags) and are not mocked up or typed out in a non-browser application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Bookmark Folders: 'Brackets & Scoring', 'Stream Management', 'Anti-Cheat Portals', 'Team Comms', 'Personal'. Expected Search Engine: Keyword 'vlr', URL 'https://www.vlr.gg/search/?q=%s'. Expected Startup Domains: discord.com, battlefy.com. Expected Audio/Mic Exceptions: discord.com allowed, default blocked. Expected Disabled Flag: Experimental QUIC protocol (#enable-quic).
